report.claim_boundary: This report verifies local source-code and business-document evidence for monetization paths. It does not prove accepted tasks, active customers, live traffic delivery, submitted blockchain transactions, chain finality, bank settlement, or received funds.

paths.current_state: Local accounting and simulation are implemented. The service records reward events but does not claim a payout transaction.

markers_found: Record local share-to-earn accounting without claiming payout settlement.

paths.monetization_mode: DePIN: reward accounting for relayed packets and exit-node role.
paths.name: Share-to-Earn DePIN relay accounting
next_evidence_needed: Real relay-meter evidence tied to customer traffic.
A payout path that calls TokenRewards.reward_relay or another on-chain settlement path.
A confirmed transaction hash to the payout wallet.
paths.verified_finding: The service writes local reward evidence with submitted_transaction=False, settlement_recorded=False, and an empty transaction hash.

paths.current_state: A blockchain submission path exists, but it only runs when Web3, RPC, contract, account, and a private key are configured.

markers_found: Supports both local simulation and real Base Sepolia transactions.

paths.monetization_mode: Token payout path: local accounting first, optional Base Sepolia ERC20 transfer.
paths.name: TokenRewards ERC20 transfer path
next_evidence_needed: Locally configured RPC URL and token contract address.
Operator private key stored locally, not in chat.
paths.verified_finding: Without blockchain configuration, settlement is local_accounting_only. With configuration and a returned tx hash, the status becomes blockchain_submitted.

paths.current_state: The worker can release or refund local escrow records and attempts a token bridge for X0T escrows, but it does not prove external settlement finality.
paths.monetization_mode: Marketplace: release or refund escrow after uptime check.
paths.name: Marketplace escrow settlement worker
next_evidence_needed: A real held escrow created by a paying customer.
24-hour uptime evidence linked to the rented node.
External bridge receipt and independent finality verification.
paths.verified_finding: The claim gate explicitly blocks traffic delivery, external finality, bank settlement, revenue recognition, and production-readiness claims.

paths.current_state: The document describes a business direction. It is not proof of paying users or live inference revenue.
paths.monetization_mode: DeAI: route inference, federated learning, and AI service work.
paths.name: Distributed AI opportunity draft
next_evidence_needed: A concrete inference product offer with price and buyer.
A working request router with metering.
Invoice, escrow, or payout evidence from a real customer/task platform.
paths.verified_finding: The document itself says its current gate note is not current production proof.

wallet.routing_note: Use this wallet only where a platform supports direct EVM payout.
